stem: If f(x) = x + 4 and g(x) = 3x, what is the value of 5f(3) - g(3)?
rationale: Choice A is correct. f(3) = 3 + 4 = 7, so 5f(3) = 35. g(3) = 3(3) = 9. Therefore 5f(3) - g(3) = 35 - 9 = 26. The other choices result from common errors such as omitting the multiplier of 5, computing f(3) incorrectly, or subtracting in the wrong order.
